files.patch:
@@ -5,6 +5,9 @@ on:
     branches: [main]
   pull_request:
 
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
 concurrency:
   group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
   cancel-in-progress: true
@@ -20,7 +23,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
       - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
         with:
-          version: 10
+          version: 10.25.0
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
           node-version: ${{ matrix.node }}

@@ -1,9 +1,58 @@
-dist
-node_modules
-coverage
+# macOS
 .DS_Store
+._*
+.Spotlight-V100
+.Trashes
+Icon?
+
+# Editors
+.idea/
+.vscode/*
+!.vscode/extensions.json
+!.vscode/launch.json
+!.vscode/settings.json
+!.vscode/tasks.json
+
+# Logs
 *.log
+npm-debug.log*
+yarn-debug.log*
+yarn-error.log*
+pnpm-debug.log*
+
+# Env (keep examples)
 .env
 .env.*
+!.env.example
+!.env.sample
+
+# Dependencies / build output
+node_modules/
+dist/
+coverage/
+
+# Caches
+.cache/
+.turbo/
+.parcel-cache/
+.vite/
+.next/
+.nuxt/
+.svelte-kit/
+
+# TypeScript
 *.tsbuildinfo
-.pnpm-debug.log
+
+# Binaries / native artifacts
+*.exe
+*.dll
+*.so
+*.dylib
+*.a
+*.o
+*.obj
+*.class
+*.jar
+*.wasm
+*.node
+*.dSYM/
